reason: Verified that the agent can successfully open a browser, navigate to https://example.com, retrieve the page title, and report back with the correct result "Example Domain"
steps: Step 1 - Navigate to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing the Gamut application homepage with available agents listed
Step 2 - Click on "QA-20260721-021727-9t60" agent in sidebar — Agent page opened successfully, showing the agent's chat interface with input field ready for messages
Step 3 - Send message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message was typed into the input field and sent successfully, triggering the agent to start processing

Step 4 - Wait up to 3 minutes for response — Agent completed its task in 12 seconds, well within the 3-minute timeout. Agent executed ToolSearch, Open Browser to https://example.com, Browser Get State, and Close Browser actions

Step 5 - Verify response mentions "Example Domain" — Response confirmed with text "The page title is \"Example Domain\"." and final summary "Done — the page at https://example.com has the title \"Example Domain\". Browser closed." The agent successfully opened a real browser, navigated to the URL, extracted the page title, and reported the correct result
